scripts.prebuild: bun ./scripts/generate-verified-behaviors.mjs && mkdir -p public/lib && cd ../builds/knockout && bun run build && cp dist/browser.min.js ../../tko.io/public/lib/ko.js && cd ../reference && bun run build && cp dist/browser.min.js ../../tko.io/public/lib/tko.js && cd ../../tko.io && bun ./scripts/bundle-tests.mjs
